info.name: Aidport API
info.description: Aidport NestJS API - Auth: agent signup is two steps (POST /auth/signup/agent with name/email/password, then PATCH /agent/profile with company details). Public GET /agents. Shipments: optional pickupMethod terminal|dispatch; rates support basicPrice + price. Admin: POST /admin/shipments/:id/send-invoice (email + Paystack link), PATCH mark-paid, PATCH assign (after payment). Agent: GET /agent/shipments (assigned only). User, Agent portal, Admin, quotes, uploads

variable.description: Shipment Mongo _id for path /shipments/:id/... — set from Create Shipment or Send Shipment Request response (_id), or paste manually.

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: Sign Up (Agent)
item.description: Step 1: body is only name, email, password. Duplicate email → 409. On success, saves accessToken + agentId to collection variables. Next: Auth → Complete Agent Profile (step 2) or Agent → same.

item.name: Complete Agent Profile (step 2)
item.description: Step 2: send pricingPlan, companyName, dateEstablished, location, aboutCompany, transportModes. Uses Bearer {{accessToken}}. Sets user isEmailVerified to true when successful.

body.raw:
{
  "pricingPlan": "basic",
  "companyName": "Acme Logistics Ltd",
  "dateEstablished": "2018-06-15",
  "location": "Lagos, Nigeria",
  "aboutCompany": "Full-service freight forwarding and customs clearance since 2018.",
  "transportModes": ["sea", "land", "air"]
}

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439012",
  "name": "Agent Smith",
  "email": "agent@example.com",
  "role": "agent",
  "isEmailVerified": true,
  "agentProfile": {
    "pricingPlan": "basic",
    "companyName": "Acme Logistics Ltd",
    "dateEstablished": "2018-06-15T00:00:00.000Z",
    "location": "Lagos, Nigeria",
    "aboutCompany": "Full-service freight forwarding and customs clearance since 2018.",
    "transportModes": ["sea", "land", "air"],
    "isVerified": false,
    "status": "pending_review"
  }
}

response.name: 200 OK
200 OK
200 OK

item.name: Send Invoice (email shipper)
item.description: Admin JWT. Persists parcel line items, totalPrice, paymentLink on the shipment and emails the shipper. Configure SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS (and optional SMTP_HOST) in .env.

item.name: Mark Shipment Paid
item.description: Admin JWT. Sets paymentStatus and status to paid (e.g. after Paystack webhook or manual confirmation).

item.name: Assign Agent (after payment)
item.description: Admin JWT. Requires shipment.paymentStatus === paid. Sets assignedAgentId, acceptedBy, and status to processing. Use collection variable agentId or paste an agent user _id.

item.name: Complete Agent Profile (step 2)
item.description: Same as Auth → Complete Agent Profile (step 2). Sets user isEmailVerified to true.

body.raw:
{
  "pricingPlan": "basic",
  "companyName": "Acme Logistics Ltd",
  "dateEstablished": "2018-06-15",
  "location": "Lagos, Nigeria",
  "aboutCompany": "Full-service freight forwarding and customs clearance since 2018.",
  "transportModes": ["sea", "land", "air"]
}

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439012",

  "email": "agent@example.com",

item.name: My assigned shipments
item.description: Agent JWT. Lists shipments where assignedAgentId is this agent (set by admin after payment).

item.name: Set Shipment Rates
item.description: Assigned agent only. Each rate line may include basicPrice (base/list) and price; amount on shipment = sum(price + basicPrice per line).

request.description: Shipper JWT. Same body as Create Shipment plus agentId. Optional pickupMethod: terminal | dispatch. Sets status to requested. Set collection variable agentId to the target agent's user _id.

Agent JWT. Shipment id is IN THE URL (not the body). Set collection variable `shipmentId` to the shipment `_id` (e.g. from Send Shipment Request 201 response). If `shipmentId` is empty you get `/shipments//accept-request` — invalid.
Agent JWT. Same as accept: put shipment `_id` in the path via `{{shipmentId}}`. No body.
Agent JWT after accept. status: in_transit | picked_up | delivered

response.name: 200 OK
200 OK
response.body:
{
  "id": "{{shipmentId}}",
  "status": "in_transit",
  "trackingNumber": null,
  "trackingUrl": null,
  "events": [
    { "status": "created", "description": "Shipment created", "location": "Lagos → Abuja", "createdAt": "2025-03-11T12:00:00.000Z" },
    { "status": "accepted", "description": "Shipment accepted by agent", "createdAt": "2025-03-11T13:00:00.000Z" }
  ],
  "addressFrom": { "line1": "1121 Allen Avenue", "city": "Lagos", "state": "Lagos", "country": "NG", "name": "John Doe", "phone": "+2348012345678" },
  "addressTo": { "line1": "45 Independence Avenue", "city": "Abuja", "state": "FCT", "country": "NG", "name": "Jane Smith", "phone": "+2348098765432" },
  "carrierName": null,
  "deliveredAt": null
}
